title: cuscuta balansae
intro: Cuscuta balansae, also known as Dodder vine, is a type of parasitic plant that grows by attaching itself to other plants and absorbing their nutrients. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cuscuta balansae are said to include improving fertility, reducing symptoms of menopause, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Cuscuta balansae is often used in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is typically dried and made into a tea or capsule for consumption.
